ShieldChargeKillCooldown: Killing an enemy with Shield Charge resets its cooldown.
SkewerShotBleedingStrike: Skewer Shot deals double damage to bleeding enemies.
IceOrbFreezeToCold: Ice Orb has a 30% chance to freeze chilled enemies on hit.
ExplosiveBoltHalf: Explosive Bolt damage and cooldown decrease by 50%.
SlayerLowHpAttackSpeed: Attack Speed is amplified by 1% per 1% missing HP.
AxeSpinBleedingChance: Axe Spin's chance to cause bleeding increases to 50%.
SkillBaseAttackCountReduce: Equipped skill requires 1 less basic attack to trigger.
ChargeTrapExplosiveCooldown: Each time Explosive Bolt kills a monster, Charge Trap cooldown is reduced by 1 second.
SnowstormEnhanceFrozenEnemy: Snowstorm deals 100% additional damage to frozen enemies.
ArrowRainCriticalCooldown: When a basic attack critically hits, Arrow Rain cooldown is reduced by 0.5 seconds.
WaveMoveFastestPartyMember: Move between waves at the speed of the fastest party member.
